title: evolvulus luetzelburgii
intro: Evolvulus luetzelburgii, also known as Dwarf Morning Glory, is a flowering plant native to Brazil, characterized by its blue or white flowers and delicate, heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Evolvulus luetzelburgii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Evolvulus luetzelburgii is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and its aerial parts can also be used to make a tincture or extract, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
